livebook.title: Livebook
livebook.desc: AI-powered legal playbook system built at Hacking Legal 2026 in Munich. Transforms static legal playbooks into living systems with plain-language Q&A, clause citations, version control, and an evolve engine that grows with every negotiation.

healthie.title: Healthie
healthie.desc: Daily planner and health tracking - calorie and hydration tracking, built from design to deployment.

plannie.title: Plannie
plannie.desc: Full-stack event scheduling app with secure auth, DB management, and cloud deployment.

testprep.title: Testovanie 9 Prep
testprep.desc: Interactive study tool for Slovak state testing, used by students to prepare and self-assess.

homeserver.title: Home Server Infrastructure
homeserver.desc: Self-managed server infra - storage tech, RHEL administration, and hands-on systems work.

Phrases.build: I BUILD THINGS THAT ACTUALLY GET USED
Phrases.working: WHAT WORKING WITH ME LOOKS LIKE

Story.p1: Growing up in the UK and later moving to Bratislava, my path into tech started with curiosity, tinkering with servers, then picking up Swift, then shipping real apps.
Story.p2: I'm currently a student at SPŠE Hálova studying Digital Technology Programming, building iOS and web projects alongside my studies.
Story.p3: I work best in teams with high standards, people who care about both the code and the outcome. Slovak, English, and enough German to get by.

TechStack.title: TECH STACK
TechStack.subtext: The tools, languages, and frameworks I use to build robust applications and manage infrastructure.

t1.title: Proactive
t1.desc: I flag problems before they become blockers

Connect.heading: LET'S BUILD SOMETHING
